name: Raia Drogasil S.A.
summary: Raia Drogasil S.A. engages in the retail sale of medicines, perfumery, personal care and beauty products, cosmetics, dermocosmetics, and specialty medicines in Brazil. As of September 30, 2020, the company operated a network of 2,223 drug stores in 23 Brazilian states. It also markets its goods through telesales and its three call centers in the states of S√É¬£o Paulo and Tocantins. The company was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
